div.div:
/eval-analyze
bootstrap eval.yaml
analyze skill under test

div.div:
Load Config
read eval.yaml
verify skill, models, judges
check tool interception coverage
persist flags via state.py

div.div:
Find Dataset
read dataset.path from config
verify case subdirectories
apply --case filter
